gaussian_input.description: Additive Gaussian noise on input images in the unchanged [0, 1] scale.

gaussian_latent.description: Relative Gaussian noise: z + alpha * std(z) * epsilon.

impulse.description: Salt-and-pepper noise. One spatial mask is shared by RGB channels.

rotation.description: Bilinear rotation in both directions after reflection padding.

occlusion.description: Square occlusion covering the given image-area fraction, filled with per-channel image means.
